title: CustomCraftingRecipes
body:
# Custom Crafting Recipes (CCR)

**A professional Minecraft plugin that allows you to create and manage custom crafting recipes via an intuitive in-game menu, featuring a visual editor and seamless admin integration.**

---

### Key Features

| Feature | Description |
| :--- | :--- |
| **Visual GUI Editor** | Design recipes directly within a familiar crafting-grid interface. |
| **In-Game Management** | Browse, edit, and delete your recipes in a clean, paginated list. |
| **Chronological Sorting** | Keep track of your work with newest recipes always appearing first. |
| **Immersive Soundscape** | High-quality, custom-pitched audio feedback for all UI actions. |
| **Instant Live-Reload** | Update all configurations and languages on the fly via command. |
| **Localization Ready** | Full multi-language support (pre-configured for EN and DE). |
| **Debug & Safety** | Built-in click-cooldown and duplicate detection for maximum stability. |

---

### Commands & Permissions

* **/ccr** - Opens the Recipe Manager GUI.
* **/ccr reload** - Reloads all configuration files and recipes.
* **/ccr debug** - Toggles the developer debug mode.
* **Permission:** `ccr.admin`
